name: Battlewasp - Arbalest the Rapidfire
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｂ・Ｆ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ビー・フォース</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>早</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はや</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>撃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>う</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ちのアルバレスト
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 Level 3 or lower Insect monster in your GY; Special Summon that monster in Defense Position. If this card in its owner's possession is destroyed by an opponent's card: You can Special Summon 1 "Battlewasp" monster from your hand or Deck. You can only use this effect of "Battlewasp - Arbalest the Rapidfire" once per turn.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 Level 3 or lower Insect monster in your GY; Special Summon that monster in Defense Position. If this card in its owner's possession is destroyed by an opponent's card: You can Special Summon 1 "Battlewasp" monster from your hand or Deck. You can only use this effect of "Battlewasp - Arbalest the Rapidfire" once per turn.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 Level 3 or lower Insect monster in your GY; Special Summon that monster in Defense Position. If this card in its owner's possession is destroyed by an opponent's card: You can Special Summon 1 "Battlewasp" monster from your hand or Deck. action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
